nasb.text: The Lord redeems the soul of His servants, And none of those who take refuge in Him will be condemned.

esv.text: The Lord  redeems the life of his servants; none of those who take refuge in him will be condemned.

cnv.text: 耶和華救贖他僕人的性命； 凡是投靠他的，必不被定罪。

ccb.text: 耶和华必救赎祂的仆人， 投靠祂的人必不被定罪。

csbs.text: 耶和华救赎他仆人们的灵魂， 所有投靠他的都不致承担罪责。
